description: Structured trade signals. Bull writes PENDING orders here when Alpaca API is unreachable. Local relay (pmi_relay.py) picks these up and executes.

orders.reasoning: VIX 17.38 OFFENSE. ACN beat + soft bookings = NVDA-only signal. NVDA above 50-day MA. All 5 entry conditions met. Alpaca API blocked in cloud env — relay execute.
